history.content:
<thought>
I am at the top-left interior cell facing right. The cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The path downward along the left column is open and leads around the lava toward the goal, so I should first turn to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down, and the cell directly below me is open floor. The left column provides a safe route downward around the lava barrier, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly below is still open floor, and continuing downward along the left side is the safe way around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can keep moving down safely along the leftmost open path. The cell ahead is empty floor, so continuing forward is the best move.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The path directly ahead remains clear floor, and I need to continue downward to reach the open bottom corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am one step above the bottom corridor, and the cell ahead is still open floor. Moving forward will place me at the junction where I can then head right toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at the left end of the bottom passage but still facing down toward the wall. To move along the corridor toward the goal on the right, I should first turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, but the cell directly ahead is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. The open corridor to the goal is below me, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Now I am facing down, and the cell directly below me is open floor in the bottom corridor. Moving forward will place me on the safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am on the bottom corridor facing down, but the cell ahead is a wall. To move along the corridor toward the goal on the right, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right in a clear corridor, and the goal is further to the right on the same row with open floor in between. The best move is to advance.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right in an open corridor, and the goal remains directly to the right with no obstacles ahead. I should keep moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am still facing right on the bottom corridor, and the path to the goal is clear straight ahead. Moving forward brings me closer.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and there are still open cells between me and the goal on the same row. The best move is to continue forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right with one open cell before the goal, and the path is unobstructed. Moving forward places me next to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right and the goal is directly in front of me. Moving forward will reach it.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
